entities.description: entity resolution adjudicator is an expert role tasked with determining if a new entity refers to the same real world concept as candidate entities
new entity is a recently extracted entity from a text that needs to be matched against candidate entities
candidate entities are a list of semantically similar entities retrieved from an existing knowledge base for comparison
knowledge graph is the existing database from which candidate entities are retrieved
knowledge base is the source of semantically similar candidate entities
json object is the required format for the output containing the id of the matching candidate and an explanation
id is a unique identifier used to reference candidate entities in the output
1 is a specific value indicating that no matching candidate was found for the new entity
text is the source material from which the new entity is recently extracted
explanation is a brief description required in the output to justify the decision

relations.description: the entity resolution adjudicator evaluates the new entity to find a match
the entity resolution adjudicator compares the new entity against the candidate entities
the new entity is compared against the candidate entities to determine if they refer to the same concept
candidate entities are retrieved from the knowledge graph
candidate entities are retrieved from the knowledge base
the entity resolution adjudicator must output the result in a json object format
the entity resolution adjudicator outputs the id of the matching candidate
the entity resolution adjudicator outputs  1 if no match is found
the entity resolution adjudicator provides an explanation for the decision
the new entity is extracted from the text
each candidate entity has a unique id for reference
the json object contains the id of the matching candidate
the json object contains the explanation for the decision
